_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and review specific cyber operations guidance for integration into broader planning activities.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.454), DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.452).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.434). Shared vocabulary: [develop]. DCWF-only terms [activities, broader, cyber, guidance, integration, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, data, definition, initiatives, maintain, milestone] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.884, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Develop and review specific cyber operations guidance for integration into broad" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.459 ≈ STS 0.434 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [develop] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [develop]. DCWF-only: [activities, broader, cyber, guidance, integration, operations]. WIDAI-only: [ai, data, definition, initiatives, maintain, milestone].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
